trends.name: China DeepSeek AI Disruption
trends.summary: China's DeepSeek AI breakthrough triggered broad selling in U.S. AI stocks, raising questions about competitive moats of established tech giants. Market repriced AI leadership and valuations amid concerns over Chinese technological advancement and cost-effective alternatives.

trends.name: Geopolitical Risk & Iran Conflict
trends.summary: Iran conflict escalation shifted market sentiment just as consumer confidence was improving, triggering safe-haven flows into precious metals and currencies while affecting oil pricing. The geopolitical uncertainty is creating volatility in risk assets and energy markets.

trends.name: Precious Metals Supercycle
trends.summary: Gold and silver streaming companies are gaining attention as investors position for a precious metals supercycle, with commentary highlighting attractive valuations in Triple Flag and Wheaton Precious Metals. Geopolitical tensions and currency debasement concerns are supporting the thesis.

trends.name: Fed Policy & Rate Cut Expectations
trends.summary: ECB rate-hike expectations are drawing parallels to pre-2008 financial crisis dynamics, with strategists warning of tightening cycle risks. Mortgage rates have swung above 6%, creating headwinds for real estate and consumer borrowing.

trends.name: Labor Market Resilience vs. Productivity Concerns
trends.summary: Jobless claims hit 3-month lows while consumer credit surged in December, but productivity slowed in Q4 while unit labor costs accelerated. This creates a mixed picture: strong labor demand but potential cost-push inflation risks ahead.

trends.name: Bitcoin & Crypto Market Volatility
trends.summary: IBIT commentary suggests Bitcoin is navigating a deep correction with long-term $126,000 target, indicating crypto market volatility and longer-term institutional positioning. DeepSeek news and macro uncertainty are creating near-term headwinds.

trends.name: Semiconductor Strength & Earnings Beats
trends.summary: Micron Q2 earnings preview signals another strong quarter for semiconductor demand, bucking broader AI-driven selloff narrative. Memory chip demand remains robust despite macro concerns and competitive pressures.

trends.name: Dividend & Income Strategy Rotation
trends.summary: Investor interest in 'safer' dividend-paying equities and funds is rising, with focus on monthly pay dividend strategies as market volatility increases. This reflects defensive positioning and income-seeking behavior in uncertain environment.

trends.name: Real Estate & Housing Market Pressure
trends.summary: Higher mortgage rates above 6% are pressuring residential real estate demand, while HOA fees for single-family homes are rising above $500/month. Real estate services companies and developers are facing near-term headwinds (SBA Communications, Glenveagh Properties).

trends.name: Energy Sector M&A & Oil Price Dynamics
trends.summary: Natural gas and energy sector deals are accelerating (Diversified Energy-Permian, QXO-Beacon), while oil prices retreated from $100 as U.S. temporarily lifted sanctions on Russian oil. Energy valuations are attractive amid commodity volatility.

trends.name: Commodity Inflation & Input Cost Pressures
trends.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit record highs due to U.S.-Colombia tariff tensions, while natural gas prices fluctuate on weather forecasts. Input cost inflation is threatening profit margins across food, beverage, and industrial sectors.

trends.name: Activist Investor Pressure & Valuation Gaps
trends.summary: Starboard Value's letter to CarMax highlights ongoing activist pressure on undervalued retail automotive assets, while sectors like healthcare (Zoetis) and hospitality (ONE Group) offer 'on sale' opportunities. Value rotation themes remain compelling amid market dislocations.
